summary: Bitcoin shows V-shaped bounce potential with ETF inflows supporting bulls above $72,000, while silver faces resistance at $90 amid rising US yields; mixed sentiment across equities with tech pullback concerns offsetting AI momentum gains of ~30% in crypto.
